info.english_meaning: to serve to worship to care
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: BaktiH - Bajanam  ' BaktO vfRIte varaRe vfRoti vfRute vfYaH ' (Slo. 32) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'varjayitvA tu me vajraM pravfRIzva yaTecCasi' (BA॰vana॰310.19) yaTezwaM varayetyAha atrArTe praSabdo dyotako nAvaSyakaH kevalasyApi prayogadarSanAt- 'vfRate hi vimfSyakAriRaM guRalubDAH svayameva sampadaH' (ki॰2.30)
'karomi kAmaM kaM te'dya pravfRIzva yamicCasi' (BA॰droRa॰12.4) Ryantasya praSabdapUrvatvaM niyatam
'taM te pravArayAmAsurnirAsuSca parAvasum' (BA॰vana॰138.20) pravfRIzva kAmaM yAcasveti prAyUyujan

'nanu Bojyezu pAnezu vastrezvABaraRezu ca pravArayati sarvAnnaH…' (rA॰2.77.15) bahUnyABaraRAdIni divyavastUnyupasTApya aNga ezu kiM te'pekzitaM gfhAReti prakarzeRAsmadizwavaraRaM kArayatItyarTa iti tilakaH
'pravAraRaM tu bAlAnAM pUrvaM kAryamiti SrutiH tasmAtpravAraRaM pUrvamarhaH pArTo DanaYjayaH' (BA॰u॰7.17) |
'tadvfRItAM BavAnagre pravAryastvaM hi DarmataH' (BA॰u॰7.20) kAmyaM te dadAnIti preryaH
'nivarA kanyA' (nO vf DAnye pA0 3348 ityatra pratyudAharaRam) niScitaM vriyata iti nivarA
